title: No import/export functionality for agent profiles
description: There are no import or export buttons/options anywhere in the Agent Profiles UI. Users cannot export a profile to share with team members or import a profile configuration from a file.
steps_to_reproduce:
1. Navigate to Agent Profiles
2. Select any profile
3. Search all tabs for import/export options
4. None found
expected: Import/Export buttons to save profile configurations as JSON files and load them
